name: Glen Oak Golf Club
about: Glen Oak Golf Club is an 18-hole championship golf course designed by Robert Trent Jones, located just 25 minutes from downtown Buffalo, NY. The venue offers traditional golf on a championship course complemented by a new indoor golf simulator facility. Simulators are available year-round, and the club provides a full range of services including PGA instruction, equipment fittings, and catering for events. The facility uses a dynamic pricing model for tee times and offers online booking for both on-course play and simulator sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art GCHawk Premium launch monitor technology in the simulator room
18-hole championship course designed by Robert Trent Jones
PGA Professional instruction available for all skill levels
Full-service club with on-site dining and event spaces
GPS-enabled Tempo Club Car golf carts with charging stations

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant and bar service available at Mahaney's Pub, with drop-off catering and wedding packages offered
Available at Mahaney's Pub, with DoorDash delivery service

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or rentals are likely available, though specific rental policies aren't detailed on the website.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies aren't specified, but the venue has an on-site pub (Mahaney's Pub) that offers food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify typical round times, but it's a championship 18-hole course with GPS carts and large practice facilities.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers youth golf programs and appears to accommodate families, though specific age restrictions aren't mentioned.
